name: Callipeen
description: The Callipeen is a Jakobs sniper family built around strong base damage. Weaker variants tend to handle like slow, bolt-action rifles, while higher-quality rolls can fire more quickly with semi-auto style behaviour and a different damage trade-off. Overall it is a flexible, general-purpose sniper line rather than a gimmick weapon.
notes: Can drop as a regular world item from appropriate loot sources. A Gearbox-branded version was available via the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. Some scope markings include Cyrillic text referencing killing or assassination.
